title: CLIF ventilator-QI scorecard tile feed (v1)
description: One PHI-free, pre-aggregated feed per metric vertical. Renders one scorecard tile AND is the per-site federated submission unit (counts pool as Sum(num)/Sum(den)). See tile_feed_contract.md.

metric_id.description: Unique slug; also the registry key + placeholder it replaces (lpv, proning, sat, ...).

detail_href.description: Filename of the metric's detail dashboard, shipped next to the feed; the combiner copies it into output/dashboard/.

goal.description: Target fraction (draws a goal bar); null = no goal bar.

note.description: Optional caption under the tile (e.g. a coverage caveat).

generated.description: ISO timestamp (kept top-level for back-compat; also in provenance).

ui.description: Renderer hints for the combiner's global selectors (finest-grained feed only).

provenance.description: Pooling-ready metadata. Optional for local rendering; REQUIRED for consortium submission.

site_id.description: Internal site label; the coordinating center anonymizes to 'Site N'.

code_version.description: Bundle git SHA at run time.

definition_version.description: Bumps only when eligibility/denominator changes; sites must share it to be pooled.

cell.description: Counts only — rate = num/den. Never pre-divided (so it pools across sites).
